entries.title: Service Monitor Check
entries.content:
## Health Check Results

- **XRP Bot**: ✅ OK - Running (paper mode, SHORT +$4.82)
- **The Hub**: ✅ OK - Dashboard running on :3000 (3 days uptime)
- **Gateway**: ⚠️ WARNING - mDNS/Bonjour re-advertising loop detected

**Action**: Telegram alert sent due to WARNING status.

**Uptime**: Gateway 1d 15h | Hub 3d
